original_text:
### Campaign Headline ("YOU DESERVE MORE")
- Set in **Agenda** (digital may use Agenda as live text for this headline only; email fallback: Nunito Sans ExtraBold).
- **ALL CAPS, always.**
- The letters **"D" (in DESERVE) and "M" (in MORE) are set at approximately 40% tint** of the headline color — a nod to the "d" and "m" of dermatomyositis.
- Two approved colorways: brand **Gold/Sunshine** or **Brand Blue** (tinted letters at 40% of the same hue).
- Stack as three lines (YOU / DESERVE / MORE) in hero placements, left-aligned.
- Full lockup copy: "**YOU DESERVE MORE.** So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis."

relations.note: Styling and verbatim copy constraints combine to form the complete visual lockup.
Colorways are applied to the layout and typography of the headline.

effect.content: YOU DESERVE MORE. So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis.

quotes: "YOU DESERVE MORE. So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis."
"YOU DESERVE MORE. So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis."

rules.intent: Maintain medical/legal/regulatory alignment for the core brand campaign value proposition.
rules.rule_text: The full campaign headline lockup must read verbatim: "YOU DESERVE MORE. So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis."

quotes: Set in Agenda (digital may use Agenda as live text for this headline only; email fallback: Nunito Sans ExtraBold).
Stack as three lines (YOU / DESERVE / MORE) in hero placements, left-aligned.

rules.intent: Ensure exact typographic replication of the campaign identity.
rules.rule_text: The campaign headline 'YOU DESERVE MORE' must be set in the Agenda font (fallback: Nunito Sans ExtraBold/800), must always be in ALL CAPS (campaign.headline.case = all_caps), and must be left-aligned (alignment.campaign.headline_lockup = left-aligned) stacked as three lines in hero placements.

quotes: The letters "D" (in DESERVE) and "M" (in MORE) are set at approximately 40% tint of the headline color — a nod to the "d" and "m" of dermatomyositis.
Two approved colorways: brand Gold/Sunshine or Brand Blue (tinted letters at 40% of the same hue).

rules.intent: Symbolize dermatomyositis (d/m) through precise, conceptual color tints in the campaign headline.
rules.rule_text: The campaign headline must use one of two approved colorways: brand Gold/Sunshine (color.primary.gold = #ffc60a / color.primary.sunshine = #faa31b) or Brand Blue (color.primary.brand_blue = #00529b). The letters 'D' and 'M' in 'DESERVE MORE' must always be set at a 40% tint (opacity.campaign.headline_char_tint = 0.4) of the base headline color.
